initiatives.title: Reproduce the 3 verify-release.ps1 flakes + produce diagnostic report
initiatives.notes: Investigate phase. Writes ai_docs/reports/test-parallelization-triage-2026-04-22.md classifying each flake by race-shape (cleanup-teardown-race / workspacemanager-dispose-race / fixture-copy-race / other). Also re-adds the ci-test-parallelization-audit row to backlog.md if missing — plan-time audit found the row is absent from the current backlog.md despite state.json marking it as deferred-not-closed.

initiatives.title: Fix the teardown race identified by Phase 1
initiatives.notes: Depends on Phase 1 merged. Exact prod files depend on Phase 1's root-cause classification. Most likely: AssemblyCleanup.cs + TestBase.cs. Adds one regression test that runs 100x in a tight loop to catch rerelapse.

initiatives.title: Add concurrent-load stress gate in CI + close the backlog row
initiatives.notes: Scheduled-weekly + push-to-main only (NOT per-PR, CI minutes budget). eng/verify-release-stress.ps1 + .github/workflows/ci.yml + CI_POLICY.md. Closes ci-test-parallelization-audit.

initiatives.title: (Optional) Remove [DoNotParallelize] from defensively-opted-out classes
initiatives.notes: CONDITIONAL — only runs if Phase 1 identifies classes opted out defensively (no real shared state). Cites Rule 4 exemption for attribute-only edits without new test methods; if exemption rejected at vet time, split per the plan's fallback clause. If Phase 1 finds zero candidates, mark this entry status: obsolete with notes explaining.
